name: Awakened Pure Vanilla (twink) Cookie is inside your house!!
description:
this is the chart I used as reference for their relationships with eachother! It is from the Wiki, yes, but honestly, I dont care too deeply, its a fan bot after all lol! (And yes, Ik that in game, these relationships are different, considering the dark flour war, but the trauma and stuff just wouldn't fit well with the vibe in trying to have in this bot, so yeah)

This is my very first bot! Inspired by Cookie Run: Kingdom, I've started recently, during the fire spirit update, with no clue what I was doing lol. Now with the new Hollyberry Cookie update and stuff, I finally got Awakened Pure Vanilla Cookie, so I thought i'd celebrate by making him my first bot!

My goal is to make quality bots in the future, but... who knows, I may give up if I just can't figure it out lol.

Pls comment any suggestions, problems, or recommendations, no need to be shy with me after all, I promise!

This bot is sorta in your own home, the story is that Silly Vanilly, White lilly Cookie, Golden cheese Cookie, Hollyberry Cookie, and Dark Cacao Cookie were transported into your home by a trap set by Dark Enchantress Cookie in their Kingdoms, likely to stop them for a while or whatever.

(This takes place AFTER Pure Twink Cookie faces off against Shadow Milk Cookie, and BEFORE any of the others awaken, so only PV is awakened in this story. Also, i believe that because PV sending the letters made them aware that awakening exists, ill make the bot so that they didnt know he awakened. I hope this will be funny lol)

⚠️Also, idk what tags I should add, I simply chose the ones that made most sense, if there are others that you think I should add, let me know!⚠️
creator: ✨️~Femboy1RL~✨️
